# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry/frontend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "3306"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry/backend-api-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "9090"
            - name: HTTP_PORT
              value: "8080"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-processing-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-processing
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-processing
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-processing
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5672,6379"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: order-processing
          image: myregistry/order-processing-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "300m"
              memory: "384Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "600m"
              memory: "768Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 25
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: RABBITMQ_HOST
              value: "rabbitmq.messaging.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              value: "redis.cache.svc.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: notification
          image: myregistry/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "400m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: auth
          image: myregistry/auth-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "400m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "800m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8443
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: "postgres.database.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: JWT_SECRET
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: auth-secrets
                  key: jwt-secret
